rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the CockroachDB major upgrade from v23.2 to v24.1.0. It correctly followed the two-phase upgrade procedure: (1) updated the StatefulSet image to trigger a rolling restart onto v24.1.0 binaries, keeping the cluster available throughout, and (2) cleared cluster.preserve_downgrade_option to finalize the upgrade and trigger internal migrations. The agent properly handled the intermediate 'upgrading-to-24.1-step-024' state by polling until finalization. All 5 verification checks passed with real kubectl output confirming: all pods on v24.1.0, cluster version finalized at 24.1, preserve_downgrade_option cleared, all 3 nodes available and live, and SELECT version() returning CockroachDB CCL v24.1.0. The oracle also independently verified a pass.
